Name: FPoseDriverTarget
Description: Information about each target in the PoseDriver

Variables.Name: TargetScale
Variables.Description: Scale applied to this target's function - a larger value will activate this target sooner

Variables.Name: bApplyCustomCurve
Variables.Description: If we should apply a custom curve mapping to how this target activates

Variables.Name: CustomCurve
Variables.Description: Custom curve mapping to apply if bApplyCustomCurve is true

Variables.Name: DrivenName
Variables.Description:
Name of item to drive - depends on DriveOutput setting.  
	 	If DriveOutput is DrivePoses, this should be the name of a pose in the assigned PoseAsset
	 	If DriveOutput is DriveCurves, this is the name of the curve (morph target, material param etc) to drive
